training_status: works in construction, lifts weights sometimes

benefits.description: Down from 287 lbs (started Aug 10) to 218-220 lbs current weight

side_effects.description: Nausea experienced when increasing dose or eating too much
Dehydration experienced requiring increased fluid intake

protocol_notes: 5'7" tall, 35 years old. Titration protocol: 1mg for 2 weeks, 2mg for 2 weeks, 3mg for 2 weeks. Attempted 4mg but severe nausea occurred, dropped back to 3mg, then 3.5mg, and finally titrated to 4mg. Drinks 2 Celsius energy drinks daily and water, drinks alcohol socially. Eats flexible diet with focus on high protein and high fiber. Started August 10.
